case_title: UNIFIED CCR PARTNERS, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP VS. JERALDINE FRANK et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIFIED CCR PARTNERS, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK, JERALDINE $1,284.84 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $365.74 INTEREST, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,315.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
